data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplistic navigation for quick user decision-making.
data.technical_spec: Intuitive categorization and search function for product discovery.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Consistent design reflecting user familiarity with other e-commerce platforms.
data.technical_spec: User interface consistency with standard e-commerce patterns.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Efficient call-to-action placements reducing time to target selection.
data.technical_spec: Prominent 'Add to Cart' and 'Buy Now' buttons.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing layout that enhances perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Clean design with whitespace and color contrast.

data.title: Zeigarnik Effect
data.description: Highlighted incomplete actions to improve user follow-through.
data.technical_spec: Shopping carts and wishlists encourage return interactions.
